case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. VS. MONYA N HARGROVE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE RE: CONTINUED OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARGROVE, MONYA N AKA MONYA NASHELL TURNER $9,447.94 PRINCIPAL, $978.44 INTEREST, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,577.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT HARGROVE, MONYA N AKA MONYA NASHELL TURNER NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
